summary: Iteration 185 P2 Features Testing Complete - All backend tests passed (13/13), all frontend pages verified working

issues: 'Missing API Keys' modal appears on all pages - this is expected behavior warning about optional integrations (Heartbeat, Emailit, Cloudinary), does not block functionality

fraud_warning_system.description: GET /api/habits/my-warnings returns warnings array, active_warning, rejection_count. POST /api/habits/acknowledge-warning/{id} returns 404 correctly for non-existent warnings

team_system.description: GET /api/referrals/my-team returns team array with member activity data and stats (total, active, in_danger, new_this_week)

smart_registration_security.description: GET /api/admin/pending-registrations returns flagged registrations. POST approve/reject endpoints return 404 correctly for non-existent users

admin_cleanup_page.description: GET /api/admin/cleanup-overview returns all 5 metrics: pending_proofs, fraud_warnings, in_danger, auto_suspended, pending_registrations

frontend_my_team_page.description: TeamPage loads with 4 stat cards (Total Members, Active This Week, In Danger, New This Week) and team member list

frontend_admin_cleanup_page.description: AdminCleanupPage loads with 5 stat cards (Pending Proofs: 3, Fraud Warnings: 0, In Danger: 0, Auto-Suspended: 0, Pending Signups: 0)

sidebar_nav_items.description: 'My Team' link found in sidebar Growth section via data-testid='nav-my_team'. Admin Dashboard button found

regression_tests.forum_tabs: PASS - Open/Solved/All tabs visible and working
